name: Festive Raisin Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry according to package directions.
2. Line small tart pans (2 1/2 inches in diameter and 3/4 inch deep) with pastry, placing them on a baking sheet.
3. Finely chop the raisins and walnuts.
4. Combine the chopped raisins and walnuts with brown sugar, butter, orange juice, beaten egg, and half and half.
5. Bake at 425°F for about 20 minutes or until the pastry is lightly browned.
6. Top with whipped cream if desired.
7. Makes 1 dozen small tarts.
